heading: Command and supervision
label: 7434 Command and supervision

children.label: a
children.text: The supervision and charge of the Academy is in the Department of the Army, under officers of the Army detailed to that duty by the Secretary of the Army.

children.label: b
children.text: The immediate government of the Academy is under the Superintendent, who is also the commanding officer of the Academy and of the military post at West Point.

children.label: c
children.text: The Commandant of Cadets is the immediate commander of the Corps of Cadets, and is in charge of the instruction of the Corps in tactics.

children.label: d
children.text: The permanent professors and the director of admissions exercise command only in the academic department of the Academy.
